_note: Curated local officials for Florida's top 6 metros (demo data). Mayor + governing body. FL municipal elections are officially non-partisan; party labels are included where publicly known. City slugs use lowercase, hyphen-separated form (e.g. 'st-petersburg').
_source: Manually curated from each city's public directory. Replace with a municipal-directory feed when available.
